scenarios.notes: A/B/C target games, contests 26-28, and specs 66-74 passed allowlist, odds, status, and quote-ready gates.
SDK/CLI v0.10.0, MM head 6f3ccc1, MM internal SDK v0.9.0, and ancillary repo heads were recorded.
Expected-address/auth checks and public balances/allowances were captured; secret paths/signatures were omitted.
Only bounded USDC approvals were used; no unlimited approval was recorded.
Dry run wouldSubmitCount=18 across nine contest/market pairs with strict allowlist [26,27,28], seedSpeculations=false, no bad events.
Retry live run posted 18 tiny live quotes across moneyline, spread, and total for contests 26-28.
Controlled fills landed on A moneyline, B spread, and C total; primary binding is A moneyline contest 26/spec 66.
Telemetry recorded three own-state-stream fill events; bad own-state and OwnerPositionStatusForUnknownPosition counts were zero.
Final open commitments are zero and final target wallet active/pending/claimable counts are zero.
Block G did not include a separate scratch cold-start probe; zero-open and no-orphan process checks were captured.
Official finals were verified and score request/callback evidence exists for contests 26-28.
Winning positions were claimed; final target wallet counts are zero.
Budget forecast total fees plus controlled risk envelope was 7.73 USDC, within 25 USDC target and 35 USDC hard stop.
